case_title: LAWRENCE, EARL A. VS VARGAS & ESQUIVEL CONTRUCTION CO. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $459.85 FILED BY LAWRENCE, EARL A. AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS & ESQUIVEL CONTRUCTION CO. VICKER'S CONCRETE SAWING, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-26-1998 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VICKER'S CONCRETE SAWING, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAWRENCE, EARL A. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VARGAS & ESQUIVEL CONTRUCTION CO. VICKER'S CONCRETE SAWING, INC. DEFENDANT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO VICKERS CONCRETE SAWING INC. NO PROOF OF SERV ON VARGAS & ESQUIVEL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
